programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.desc: Melissa Lee and Michael Santoli take viewers through all the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading; strategists and money managers debate actionable ideas and the market themes of the day.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: The information normally reserved for the Wall Street trading floor, enabling viewers to make decisions that give them a chance to make money; the news with an angle that won't be seen until tomorrow's papers.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny

Annie begins dating Marty, but she is brought up short when his family refuses to invite her to his birthday party because of her working-class, eccentric father.

As they race against time, and Donlin pushes them hard through an arduous and dangerous journey, the Sioux start taking out the soldiers one at a time. Meanwhile, Donlin also clashes with Lt. John Haywood (John Ireland), who Donlin knows is having an affair with his wife, Celie (Marie Windsor).

programme.title: Silver Lode
programme.desc: A Nevada rancher (John Payne) is taken from his bride (Lizabeth Scott) by a killer (Dan Duryea) posing as a U.S. marshal on the Fourth of July.

programme.title: Three Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a small western community turn on Jim Guthrie (Dana Andrews) when he becomes the prime suspect for a murder he didn't commit. Before getting a chance to prove his innocence, Jim is driven from his home and into the wilderness, where he is left for dead. Despite the danger, he comes back years later, discovering that he's still a wanted man. But a kindhearted local named Chris (Dianne Foster) believes his story, and together they begin a desperate search for the true culprit.

programme.title: Jason and the Argonauts
programme.desc: After saving the life of his royal father's usurper, Pelias (Douglas Wilmer), whom he fails to recognize, Jason (Todd Armstrong) is encouraged by the conniving murderer to begin a quest in search of the Golden Fleece. In doing so, Pelias hopes for Jason's death to thwart the prophecy that he will reclaim the throne. Along the journey, Jason is protected by the goddess Hera (Honor Blackman), and his crew includes Hercules (Nigel Green) and Acastus (Gary Raymond), a saboteur planted by Pelias.

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: The Zachary family live quietly on a cattle ranch in post-Civil War Texas. A stranger (Joseph Wiseman) appears and disturbs their bucolic existence by spreading a malicious rumor that their adopted daughter, Rachel (Audrey Hepburn), is a Kiowa Native American. Soon, the Zachary brothers (Audie Murphy, Burt Lancaster) and their mother (Lillian Gish) must defend themselves from both racist whites and vengeful Kiowa.

programme.title: Les Misérables
programme.desc: After swiping a loaf of bread to feed his family, Frenchman Jean Valjean is put behind bars. After countless failed attempts, the poor man finally manages to escape from prison -- but not from the attentions of determined police officer Javert. Years pass, and Valjean has made a new life for himself as the mayor of a French town. But his secret past comes back to haunt him when his old adversary suddenly makes an appearance.

programme.desc: Maj. Gresham (Malcolm McDowell) is a flying ace who oversees a group of English pilots during World War I. His latest recruit is Lt. Croft idolizes Gresham at first, but the image of his hero is tarnished when he learns of Gresham's private habits, especially his predilection for alcohol. It's only after Croft himself has endured the crucible of war that he comes to fully appreciate his commanding officer.

programme.title: Roughshod

programme.title: Renegades
programme.desc: Hannah Brockway has a perfect fiancé in Dr. Sam Martin. Sam, who is respected by Hannah's family, is a noble man who cares for her and can make a good living in their frontier town. Yet Hannah craves adventure and finds it when she meets dashing Ben Dembrow, the youngest of a notorious crime family. Together Ben and Hannah set off to forge a new life, but prejudice and strangling family ties soon bring trouble to these newlyweds.

programme.title: Life With Father
programme.desc: In late 19th-century New York City, stockbroker Clarence Day (William Powell) strives to maintain order in his bustling household. Despite his attempts to be the chief authority over his four sons, his wife, Vinnie (Irene Dunne), is the one who truly keeps order in their home, much to Clarence's chagrin. To gain more respect, Clarence reluctantly considers making changes that will benefit everyone, including his own baptism. This slice-of-life comedy was based on a popular Broadway play.

programme.title: Day of the Badman
programme.desc: Judge Jim Scott (Fred MacMurray) wants to sentence a killer to die, but the outlaw's family members intend otherwise. All-powerful patriarch Charlie Hayes (Robert Middleton) and his intimidating kinfolk are confident they can use violence to get their doomed relative's sentence commuted into something less severe. Although Sheriff Barney Wiley (John Ericson) wilts under the family's strong-arm tactics, Scott remains determined to see justice done at the end of a rope.

programme.title: Hobson's Choice
programme.desc: Henry Hobson (Charles Laughton), a British widower, is the overbearing owner of a shoe shop. His three daughters -- Alice, Vicky and Maggie (Brenda De Banzie) -- work for him and all are eager to get out from under his thumb. When the headstrong Maggie announces she intends to marry Henry's best employee, Will (John Mills), father and daughter engage in an intense showdown. As Maggie works on launching a competing business, she also helps her sisters free themselves of their domineering father.

programme.desc: Earp and Bat find their careers in jeopardy when they arrest the owners of two competing stagecoach companies whose hired armies threaten to start a war in the streets.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Life With Father
programme.desc: In late 19th-century New York City, stockbroker Clarence Day (William Powell) strives to maintain order in his bustling household. Despite his attempts to be the chief authority over his four sons, his wife, Vinnie (Irene Dunne), is the one who truly keeps order in their home, much to Clarence's chagrin. To gain more respect, Clarence reluctantly considers making changes that will benefit everyone, including his own baptism. This slice-of-life comedy was based on a popular Broadway play.

programme.title: Outlaw Women
programme.desc: A gambling queen (Marie Windsor) and her henchwomen run things until a U.S. marshal (Richard Rober) comes to town.

programme.title: Forbidden Trail
programme.desc: A practical-joking cowboy (Buck Jones) gets serious with outlaws.

programme.title: Day of the Badman
programme.desc: Judge Jim Scott (Fred MacMurray) wants to sentence a killer to die, but the outlaw's family members intend otherwise. All-powerful patriarch Charlie Hayes (Robert Middleton) and his intimidating kinfolk are confident they can use violence to get their doomed relative's sentence commuted into something less severe. Although Sheriff Barney Wiley (John Ericson) wilts under the family's strong-arm tactics, Scott remains determined to see justice done at the end of a rope.

programme.title: Renegades
programme.desc: Hannah Brockway has a perfect fiancé in Dr. Sam Martin. Sam, who is respected by Hannah's family, is a noble man who cares for her and can make a good living in their frontier town. Yet Hannah craves adventure and finds it when she meets dashing Ben Dembrow, the youngest of a notorious crime family. Together Ben and Hannah set off to forge a new life, but prejudice and strangling family ties soon bring trouble to these newlyweds.

programme.title: The Ride to Hangman's Tree
programme.desc: Three Old West outlaws (Jack Lord, James Farentino, Don Galloway) cross paths in California during Wells Fargo stagecoach holdups.

programme.title: The 7th Voyage of Sinbad
programme.desc: Sailing to Baghdad after a narrow escape from the monster island of Colossa, the wedding plans of legendary hero Sinbad and Princess Parisa are spoiled by the scheming sorcerer Sokurah. In return for his previous help with the cyclops on Colossa, Sokurah demands that Sinbad retrieve a lamp he lost on the island. When Sinbad refuses, the conjurer shrinks Parisa, forcing the sailor and his crew back to the high seas in order to save her.

programme.title: Brannigan
programme.desc: Police Detective Jim Brannigan (John Wayne) is sent from Chicago to London to extradite a wanted American criminal, Ben Larkin (John Vernon). However, Larkin is kidnapped before Brannigan can apprehend him, igniting a manhunt throughout the city. Jennifer (Judy Geeson), a British police officer, is appointed to help Brannigan, who is frequently bewildered by English customs. Brannigan's harsh policing techniques also lead to constant clashes with Cmdr. Swann (Richard Attenborough).

programme.title: A Month in the Country
programme.desc: Two shaken soldiers (Colin Firth, Kenneth Branagh) recover from World War I one summer in a Yorkshire village.

programme.title: The Girl from San Lorenzo
programme.desc: Cisco and Pancho set out to clear their names in a series of stage robberies committed by two thugs who are impersonating them.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes is called in when a top secret document is stolen from the British Foreign Office.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp and Bat work together to help Bat win an election for county sheriff to defeat Jerry Lanphere, a crook also running for the position; Sen. Drew tells Bat he must end his friendship with Earp to gain the people's favor.

programme.title: Forbidden Trail
programme.desc: A practical-joking cowboy (Buck Jones) gets serious with outlaws.

programme.desc: A dog named Bella awakens her family just in time to take cover as tornadoes hit Nashville in March 2020, but Bella goes missing; a huge dust storm called a "haboob" engulfs Phoenix, AZ.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: Shift
programme.desc: Can I use blockchain technology? Will artificial intelligence take over my career? What exactly is "Machine Learning"? We talk to experts, present the key facts and explain complicated subjects in a simple manner. SHIFT - substantial, never superficial.

These are some of the questions "SHIFT - Living in the Digital Age" tries to answer. The program focuses on a single topic - in depth and in detail. We talk to experts, present the key facts and explain complicated subjects in a simple manner. SHIFT - substantial, never superficial.

programme.title: REV
programme.desc: Life isn't about the destination, but the journey to get there, something Rev completely adheres to. The show brings you updates from the world of cars, examining the latest news and events pertaining to vehicles. From test driving the latest vehicles to examining how engineering is changing to combat climate change, Rev explores every avenue of car-based news, keeping fellow petrol heads up to date with developments within the industry.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: Euromaxx
programme.desc: Weekly lifestyle show on DW presents Europe at its best, starting from culture news to entertainment events, beautiful views of natural scenery and most fascinating modern art pieces. Enjoy Europe in its diversity, its absorbing insights and amazing lifestyle. Explore its best restaurants with most sophisticated cuisine, and hundreds of extraordinary topics and captivating stories. Euromaxx is produced in German, English, Spanish and Arabic. Join and learn all about extraordinary European traditions.

programme.title: Last Refuge from Deportation
programme.desc: For more than 40 years, German churches have been offering refugees church asylum. But this is not a legal right. And the practice is increasingly being called into question by German authorities.

programme.title: Reporter: On Location
programme.desc: It is all about dedicated reporters who are at the top table of world affairs and provide on-the-spot commentary from different parts of Germany, Europe and around the globe. On-the-ground reporters are always close to the action, and cover international events or curious facts of daily life. With their camera on, they are always ready to inform the viewers about top events and key stories in various spheres of life.

programme.title: Eco-at-India
programme.desc: Consumption of goods by people is drastically influencing environment. Eco India is a DW program entirely dedicated to Indian subcontinent and it looks at possibilities to strike a balance, and make consumption more sustainable, in such way to avoid point of no return. The program draws our attention to such essential aspects as being mindful about how much fuel, electricity, plastic, water we are using, so we can manage household budget and give a boost to climate change.

programme.title: In Good Shape

programme.title: Sports Life
programme.desc: Sports Life explores the world of sport, bringing you updates, interviews and reports from across the globe. Sport has the power to break down barriers, improve lives, connect communities, and of course, improve health. The show delves into all aspects of sport, from professionals competing at the very top to everyday individuals simply enjoying a pastime, demonstrating how sport and life are regularly connected.

programme.title: Shift

programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: The Day
programme.desc: The news as it happened, presented, clarified and analysed by experts and specialists. Studio-based and in-the field summaries and analysis of the events to have marked the previous twenty-four hours enable understanding and place within a wider context the issues that have shaped, focused and given direction over the course of the previous day.

programme.title: Eco-at-India
programme.desc: Consumption of goods by people is drastically influencing environment. Eco India is a DW program entirely dedicated to Indian subcontinent and it looks at possibilities to strike a balance, and make consumption more sustainable, in such way to avoid point of no return. The program draws our attention to such essential aspects as being mindful about how much fuel, electricity, plastic, water we are using, so we can manage household budget and give a boost to climate change.

programme.title: India
programme.desc: India has set its sights on becoming an economic global power. For western entrepreneurs, the country could be a feasible alternative to China. But how sustainable is the current boom?

programme.title: Global Us
programme.desc: Global Us provides unexpected insights and exemplary solutions - it offers perspectives for a rapidly changing world. The focus is on people - those who want change, drive it forward and inspire others.

programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.title: Close up: The Current Affairs Documentary
programme.desc: The weekly half-hour program delivers in-depth reporting on topical political issues and newsworthy events. Revealing the story behind the stories, "Close up" is informative, gripping and visually powerful.

programme.title: Reporter: On Location
programme.desc: It is all about dedicated reporters who are at the top table of world affairs and provide on-the-spot commentary from different parts of Germany, Europe and around the globe. programme.title: Tomorrow Today
programme.desc: Science show on DW provides its viewers a weekly dose of useful scientific information regarding various areas. If you are into cosmos and universe, then this show is made for you. Find out if it is possible to predict solar storms, whether plants are smart, if synthetic fuels can help protect environment, what are the results of the largest-ever polar expedition, and many more questions in different spheres of life.

programme.title: In Good Shape
programme.desc: In Good Shape is the weekly health show on DW, entirely dedicated to health care. Find out everything about new medical treatments, alternative medicine, wellness, fitness, and nutrition. The show's hosts and guests discuss key topics with specialists, and offer opportunities to receive tips and tools for a healthy lifestyle directly from experts. Learn how natural remedies can help you stay healthier, how you can maintain a healthy diet, how to manage stress and how to improve your quality of life.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

programme.title: Made in Germany
programme.desc: Featuring analysis from experts and interviews with aspiring entrepreneurs, Made in Germany explores the diverse business sector in Germany, revealing how Europe's strongest economy affects business across the world. The team of determined reporters travel across Germany and Europe to meet individuals driving the economy and changing the way we work. We focus on the impact technology is having on business, company ethics and practices and the social issues across the country's workforce. These stories and experiences shine a light on how global business is changing.

DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

programme.title: Eco-at-India
programme.desc: Consumption of goods by people is drastically influencing environment. Eco India is a DW program entirely dedicated to Indian subcontinent and it looks at possibilities to strike a balance, and make consumption more sustainable, in such way to avoid point of no return. The program draws our attention to such essential aspects as being mindful about how much fuel, electricity, plastic, water we are using, so we can manage household budget and give a boost to climate change.

programme.title: Shift
programme.desc: Can I use blockchain technology? Will artificial intelligence take over my career? What exactly is "Machine Learning"? We talk to experts, present the key facts and explain complicated subjects in a simple manner. SHIFT - substantial, never superficial.

programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.title: REV
programme.desc: Life isn't about the destination, but the journey to get there, something Rev completely adheres to. The show brings you updates from the world of cars, examining the latest news and events pertaining to vehicles. From test driving the latest vehicles to examining how engineering is changing to combat climate change, Rev explores every avenue of car-based news, keeping fellow petrol heads up to date with developments within the industry.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: In Good Shape
programme.desc: In Good Shape is the weekly health show on DW, entirely dedicated to health care. Find out everything about new medical treatments, alternative medicine, wellness, fitness, and nutrition. The show's hosts and guests discuss key topics with specialists, and offer opportunities to receive tips and tools for a healthy lifestyle directly from experts. Learn how natural remedies can help you stay healthier, how you can maintain a healthy diet, how to manage stress and how to improve your quality of life.

programme.title: Made in Germany
programme.desc: Featuring analysis from experts and interviews with aspiring entrepreneurs, Made in Germany explores the diverse business sector in Germany, revealing how Europe's strongest economy affects business across the world. The team of determined reporters travel across Germany and Europe to meet individuals driving the economy and changing the way we work. We focus on the impact technology is having on business, company ethics and practices and the social issues across the country's workforce. These stories and experiences shine a light on how global business is changing.

programme.title: Scoop
programme.desc: Scoop provides a critical lens on the ever-evolving media landscape.

programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: (2001) Raucous comedy. A Las Vegas casino-owner sets up a unique game for six punters: a race across America, hunting for $2m. Starring John Cleese, Rowan Atkinson and Whoopi Goldberg.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: (2004) All-action thriller. Queen Latifah stars as the driver of the fastest taxi in New York, who teams up with an inept cop (Jimmy Fallon) to catch a team of female bank-robbers.

programme.title: Prey
programme.desc: (2022) It's Predator, 1719 style. Amber Midthunder stars as a Comanche hunter who must save her tribe from an extraterrestrial threat in this action prequel. If it bleeds, you can kill it.

programme.title: Crawl
programme.desc: (2019) Soggy, snappy reptilian horror with Kaya Scodelario. A talented swimmer must use her water-based skills to evade a congregation of alligators during a flood.

programme.title: No Exit
programme.desc: (2022) Thriller. A recovering addict ends up stranded at a remote visitor centre in a snowstorm with four strangers, then finds a kidnapped girl in the car park. Question is: who did it?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: LumoTV: DeSign
programme.desc: Chris helps future-proof a family's hallway for Tom, a boy recently diagnosed with Usher Syndrome.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: (1965) Western. James Stewart stars as a wealthy Virginia farming patriarch trying to keep his family together and safe in the midst of the encroaching American Civil War.

programme.title: The Andromeda Strain
programme.desc: (1971) Sci-fi thriller. When a space rocket crash-lands in the US, a fatal alien virus is released, sparking a desperate battle to defeat the extraterrestrial life form and save mankind.

programme.title: Reap the Wild Wind
programme.desc: (1942) Period melodrama. John Wayne, Ray Milland and Paulette Goddard star in this tale of fierce rivalries engendered by love and seemingly deliberate shipwrecking in 19th-century Florida.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: (2019) Roland Emmerich's sprawling, action-packed war drama about the Battle of Midway, a major turning point in World War II. Starring Ed Skrein, Luke Evans and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Monolith
programme.desc: (2022) Sci-fi horror with Lily Sullivan as a disgraced journalist investigating mysterious manifestations of vision-inducing - possibly supernatural - black bricks. Matt Vesley directs.

programme.title: Firestarter
programme.desc: (2022) Stephen King adaptation with Zac Efron. Superpowered parents try to protect their pyrokinetic daughter from a shadowy organisation. Can they stop her becoming a twisted fire starter?

programme.title: The Fury
programme.desc: (1978) Brian De Palma's supernatural horror with Kirk Douglas, John Cassavetes, Andrew Stevens and Amy Irving. A shadowy agency abducts a young man with telekinetic powers.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Rare Breed
programme.desc: (1966) Western with Maureen O'Hara and James Stewart. With the help of a drifter, a widow strives to fulfil her husband's last wish to introduce rare cattle to the perilous American west.

programme.title: Siege at Red River
programme.desc: (1954) Western. Van Johnson stars as a Confederate agent who steals a Gatling gun prototype from the Yankees and attempts to smuggle it south through enemy lines to his own side.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: (1957) Classic western with Glenn Ford and Van Heflin. The capture of a murderous stagecoach robber propels an impoverished local rancher on a perilous journey. Directed by Delmer Daves.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: (1963) Cary Grant and Audrey Hepburn star Stanley Donen's stylish Hitchcockian comedy-thriller. When her husband is murdered, a woman discovers that he was involved in a huge gold heist.

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: (2014) Amma Asante's powerful fact-based drama about Britain's first Black aristocrat. Gugu Mbatha-Raw portrays the extraordinary Dido Belle. Featuring Matthew Goode and Tom Wilkinson.

programme.title: Django Unchained Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Quentin Tarantino and stars Samuel L Jackson, Christoph Waltz, Jamie Foxx and Kerry Washington talk about making the western adventure set against a backdrop of slavery.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: (2012) Quentin Tarantino's darkly comic, award-laden western with Jamie Foxx, Christopher Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio and Samuel L Jackson. A freed slave searches for his wife... and revenge.

programme.title: Tombstone
programme.desc: (1993) Western. Kurt Russell stars in the story of legendary Wild West lawman Wyatt Earp told through the medium of the moustache. With Val Kilmer as 'Doc' Holliday and Charlton Heston.

programme.title: The Yellow Mountain
programme.desc: (1954) Western. Lex Barker and Howard Duff star as prospectors whose friendship is tested when a promising seam of the gold is discovered in a Nevada mountain. With Mala Powers.

programme.title: Arizona Raiders
programme.desc: (1965) William Whitney's brutal western. Two former Confederate rebels are offered their freedom if they can track, catch or even kill their former gang mates. Starring Audie Murphy.

programme.title: For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: (1943) Drama. Director Sam Wood's epic adaptation of Ernest Hemingway's classic story about the Spanish Civil War. Starring Oscar-nominees Gary Cooper and Ingrid Bergman.

programme.title: Battle at Apache Pass
programme.desc: (1952) Western. Apache chief Cochise is trying to keep the peace with the cavalry unit based at Fort Buchanan, but he's undermined by a government advisor and a rival Apache chief.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: (1998) Elijah Wood and Morgan Freeman star in the sci-fi disaster movie about impending meteorite-related disaster, attempts to destroy it, and possibly some cataclysmic havoc.

programme.title: Rescue Dawn
programme.desc: (2006) Werner Herzog's fact-based survival story stars Christian Bale as a US fighter pilot taken prisoner in Vietnam after being shot down during a top-secret mission.

programme.title: M3GAN
programme.desc: (2022) Creepy-doll horror with Allison Williams. A robotics engineer simultaneously invents an AI dolly and takes on the care of her orphaned niece. But can a cyborg really raise a kid?

programme.title: Corsage
programme.desc: (2022) Marie Kreutzer's tightly corseted biographical drama starring Vicky Krieps as a quietly defiant Empress Elisabeth of Austria as she turns 40 on Christmas Eve 1877. In German/subs.

programme.title: The Nevadan
programme.desc: (1950) Western with Randolph Scott and Dorothy Malone. A cunning US Marshal pretends to be a doofus to get a bank robber to take him to the hidden loot.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny
programme.desc: (1954) Oscar-nominated Humphrey Bogart, in one of his finest roles, stars in Edward Dmytryk's gripping drama as Captain Philip Queeg, in charge of a US Navy minesweeper during the war.

programme.title: Santa Fe
programme.desc: (1951) Western starring Randolph Scott. Four brothers leave the defeated South to seek jobs as the US recovers from the Civil War. As one becomes a railwayman, the others turn to crime.

programme.title: Apache Drums
programme.desc: (1951) Stephen McNally stars as a gunslinger who gets slung out of town for gambling too well, but the town might just need him soon in Hugo Fregonese's visually arresting western.

programme.title: The Land Girls
programme.desc: (1997) Moving Second World War drama starring Catherine McCormack, Rachel Weisz and Anna Friel as young women who volunteer to be agricultural workers and fall for the farmer's son.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: (2000) Fact-based legal drama. Julia Roberts won an Oscar, Golden Globe and BAFTA for her portrayal of a single mum making a huge impact at a legal firm despite having no formal training.

programme.title: Bombshell
programme.desc: (2019) Drama with Charlize Theron, Nicole Kidman and Margot Robbie. Three Fox News employees fight to expose the inappropriate behaviour of a media mogul (John Lithgow).

programme.title: Hear My Song
programme.desc: (1991) Unashamedly romantic comedy starring Ned Beatty as Josef Locke, a 1950s singer with a voice that makes women weep... in a good way. Co-starring Adrian Dunbar.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Death of the Small Coppers: When a butterfly collector and founding member of an elite IQ society is found murdered, DCI Barnaby and DS Winter are called upon to catch the culprit. S20 Ep2

programme.title: Protection
programme.desc: The first episode of a crime drama series. A police officer serving in the highly secretive witness protection department is drawn into a dangerous conspiracy by her secret lover. S1 Ep1

programme.title: Protection
programme.desc: Don't Trust Anyone: Liz pursues her unofficial investigation into DI Brandice and his possible connection with organised crime, and the unit comes under pressure. S1 Ep2

programme.desc: The 'L' Bus: Enduring '70s sitcom. When Stan needs to transport a new bed for Arthur and Olive to the house, he uses a passenger-free bus that normally employed for training drivers. S4 Ep6

programme.desc: Stan's Worst Day: Classic sitcom about a bus company. Stan has a flashback of the day he became a driver - as luck would have it, it's the same day he met his new conductor Jack. S6 Ep4

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Union Trouble: Sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor pal. The inspector asks for trouble when he reduces the canteen's opening hours and sacks Elsie the canteen girl. S6 Ep5

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Donna gets a nasty surprise when Shane reveals that he knows about her night of passion with Ross. Andy is angry to discover Jo has been drinking alcohol during her `pregnancy'.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jo finds the courage to confide in Debbie about Andy's abusive behaviour and reveals her plan to leave him. Meanwhile, Matthew finds himself falling for Anna's charms.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tony's dark side takes over as he faces another obstacle in his path to business glory. Tyrone springs a surprise on a dejected Molly, and Julie tries to get a job at the factory.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: John breaks up a fight involving Chesney, but his good deed backfires. Tony sweet-talks Rosie into persuading Kevin to sell up and David plots to make Tina jealous.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The Enemy Within: Nostalgic police drama series. An old Army friend of Blaketon causes havoc in the village, and Greengrass is in trouble when he innocently buys some stolen sheep. S7 Ep21

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Unconsidered Trifles: Nostalgic police drama series set in the 1960s. Blaketon finds himself at the wrong end of the law as Greengrass tries to cash in with some scrap motorcycles. S7 Ep22

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Dark Secrets: The lives of an eccentric couple come under scrutiny when a council official is killed and Barnaby and Jones must unearth old family secrets to find the killer. S14 Ep2

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jo tells Andy she was never pregnant and the farmer chases his terrified wife to the barn, where he badly injures himself in a fall. Gennie suspects Brenda has feelings for Bob.

programme.desc: Fiz storms across the road to confront John but is forced to apologise when the truth comes out. Tyrone decides to visit his mum and Tina is upset about David's date with Amber.

programme.desc: Heroes and Villains: Nostalgic police drama. A stolen war medal tests the friendship between a young boy and a flying ace, and Maggie and Neil try to reconcile their differences. S7 Ep23

programme.desc: Angling adventures from Newfoundland to British Columbia.

programme.desc: Fishing is used to emphasize respect for the environment, conservation, and sportsmanship.

programme.title: Shooting USA

programme.desc: Lucas and good friend Randy Harden are fresh off a gator hunt now heading to south Texas to hunt the Axis buck.

programme.title: Destined to Drive: Patrick Dempsey's Return to Racing
programme.desc: Patrick Dempsey, best known as an actor, returns to his off-screen passion, racecar driving.

programme.title: 2026 Formula Drift
programme.desc: When you mix the speed of 1,000 horsepower machines with unmatched style, raw unfiltered sound, exceptional driving precision and lots of tire smoke, you get the spectacle of Formula Drift.

programme.title: RACER Weekly
programme.desc: An inside take on the stories, happenings, personalities and cars making the headlines.

programme.title: 2026 FIM World Superbike Championship
programme.desc: The premier production-based motorcycle championship on the planet featuring the fastest 1000cc models piloted by international level riders competing in a 12-round championship across the globe.

programme.title: 2026 New Zealand Jet Sprints
programme.desc: With fast acceleration and even faster cornering, these boats produce some of the wildest action in motorsports as they race against time on a course with as many as 30 turns in less than a minute.

programme.title: Launch Control
programme.desc: Road to Gymkhana Part 1 - Behnd the scenes of the Gymkhana 2025 project.

programme.title: Launch Control
programme.desc: Road to Gymkhana Part 2 - Behind the scenes of the Gymkhana 2025 project.

programme.title: Racers Unchained
programme.desc: Tony Kanaan and Paul Tracy discuss their careers in open-wheel racing; Kanaan, an Indianapolis 500 winner and IndyCar champion, serves as the team principal for Arrow McLaren while the two drivers review their experiences in the sport.

programme.title: 2026 King of the Hammers
programme.desc: Only the strongest competitors and machines compete in this one-of-a-kind off-road race that requires both speed and survival to finish this true test of man and machine.

programme.title: Lost Classics
programme.desc: Tony helps prep a quirky, rare British TVR for sale and makes a play for one of the most elusive Camaros ever built, the legendary ZL1. When Tony is offered a rust-free '55 Chevy he knows it's too good of a deal to pass up.

programme.title: My Classic Car
programme.desc: My Classic Car is a weekly television program that captures America's Love affair with the automobile! Dennis Gage, the handlebar mustachioed host, takes you along for the ride and keeps it entertaining with his unique perspective and enthusiasm for all things automotive. This show has something for everyone. From daily-drivers to Dusenberg's - from local cruise-ins to the most prestigious car shows in the world, this program covers it all!

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: The M6GT is back, but now she's a running, driving car, and a prototype of the car that is available from Retroformance. Stacey goes through the design, development, and trial and error it takes to bring a new component car to the market.

programme.title: Sam's Garage
programme.desc: Sam installs a new core support with a Cold Case cooling system.

programme.title: Creative Drive
programme.desc: Host Taro Koki explores the world of creativity within the automotive industry.

programme.title: Lost Classics
programme.desc: Tony helps an owner move a custom Mercury to none other than Joe Zolper as a potential buyer. Then, a lead sends Tony to a dusty garage hiding a nearly untouched Porsche RS America with just 5,000 original miles.

programme.title: 2026 DAKAR Rally
programme.desc: Part race and part survival contest, just finishing is a victory in itself; spanning 14 days and 5,000 miles, this marathon off-road event is a test of endurance that rewards precision and punishes mistakes.

programme.title: Hope and Health With Mathew Embry
programme.desc: Retired anesthesiologist Bill Code about living with multiple sclerosis for nearly three decades. Diagnosed in 1996, Bill shares how his medical background and personal experience shaped his long-term approach to managing MS. The conversation explores hyperbaric oxygen therapy, omega-3 supplementation, the microvascular theory of MS, and the role of blood flow and cellular energy in neurological health.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Inspired by the real-life Emergency Task Force of Toronto, Ontario, Canada, this taut police drama chronicles the efforts of the Strategic Response Unit (SRU), an elite and highly skilled group of cops charged with rescuing hostages, defusing bombs and breaking up gangs. The series title comes from another part of their job, however: getting inside a suspect's head and discovering his emotional "flashpoint" that triggered the crisis in the first place.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Inspired by the real-life Emergency Task Force of Toronto, Ontario, Canada, this taut police drama chronicles the efforts of the Strategic Response Unit (SRU), an elite and highly skilled group of cops charged with rescuing hostages, defusing bombs and breaking up gangs. The series title comes from another part of their job, however: getting inside a suspect's head and discovering his emotional "flashpoint" that triggered the crisis in the first place.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: (1965) Western. James Stewart stars as a wealthy Virginia farming patriarch trying to keep his family together and safe in the midst of the encroaching American Civil War.

programme.title: The Andromeda Strain
programme.desc: (1971) Sci-fi thriller. When a space rocket crash-lands in the US, a fatal alien virus is released, sparking a desperate battle to defeat the extraterrestrial life form and save mankind.

programme.title: Reap the Wild Wind
programme.desc: (1942) Period melodrama. John Wayne, Ray Milland and Paulette Goddard star in this tale of fierce rivalries engendered by love and seemingly deliberate shipwrecking in 19th-century Florida.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: (2019) Roland Emmerich's sprawling, action-packed war drama about the Battle of Midway, a major turning point in World War II. Starring Ed Skrein, Luke Evans and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Monolith
programme.desc: (2022) Sci-fi horror with Lily Sullivan as a disgraced journalist investigating mysterious manifestations of vision-inducing - possibly supernatural - black bricks. Matt Vesley directs.

programme.title: Firestarter
programme.desc: (2022) Stephen King adaptation with Zac Efron. Superpowered parents try to protect their pyrokinetic daughter from a shadowy organisation. Can they stop her becoming a twisted fire starter?

programme.title: The Fury
programme.desc: (1978) Brian De Palma's supernatural horror with Kirk Douglas, John Cassavetes, Andrew Stevens and Amy Irving. A shadowy agency abducts a young man with telekinetic powers.

programme.title: The Rare Breed
programme.desc: (1966) Western with Maureen O'Hara and James Stewart. With the help of a drifter, a widow strives to fulfil her husband's last wish to introduce rare cattle to the perilous American west.

programme.title: Siege at Red River
programme.desc: (1954) Western. Van Johnson stars as a Confederate agent who steals a Gatling gun prototype from the Yankees and attempts to smuggle it south through enemy lines to his own side.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: (1957) Classic western with Glenn Ford and Van Heflin. The capture of a murderous stagecoach robber propels an impoverished local rancher on a perilous journey. Directed by Delmer Daves.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: (1963) Cary Grant and Audrey Hepburn star Stanley Donen's stylish Hitchcockian comedy-thriller. When her husband is murdered, a woman discovers that he was involved in a huge gold heist.

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: (2014) Amma Asante's powerful fact-based drama about Britain's first Black aristocrat. Gugu Mbatha-Raw portrays the extraordinary Dido Belle. Featuring Matthew Goode and Tom Wilkinson.

programme.title: Django Unchained Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Quentin Tarantino and stars Samuel L Jackson, Christoph Waltz, Jamie Foxx and Kerry Washington talk about making the western adventure set against a backdrop of slavery.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: (2012) Quentin Tarantino's darkly comic, award-laden western with Jamie Foxx, Christopher Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio and Samuel L Jackson. A freed slave searches for his wife... and revenge.

programme.title: Tombstone
programme.desc: (1993) Western. Kurt Russell stars in the story of legendary Wild West lawman Wyatt Earp told through the medium of the moustache. With Val Kilmer as 'Doc' Holliday and Charlton Heston.

programme.title: The Yellow Mountain
programme.desc: (1954) Western. Lex Barker and Howard Duff star as prospectors whose friendship is tested when a promising seam of the gold is discovered in a Nevada mountain. With Mala Powers.

programme.title: Arizona Raiders
programme.desc: (1965) William Whitney's brutal western. Two former Confederate rebels are offered their freedom if they can track, catch or even kill their former gang mates. Starring Audie Murphy.

programme.title: For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: (1943) Drama. Director Sam Wood's epic adaptation of Ernest Hemingway's classic story about the Spanish Civil War. Starring Oscar-nominees Gary Cooper and Ingrid Bergman.

programme.title: Battle at Apache Pass
programme.desc: (1952) Western. Apache chief Cochise is trying to keep the peace with the cavalry unit based at Fort Buchanan, but he's undermined by a government advisor and a rival Apache chief.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: (1998) Elijah Wood and Morgan Freeman star in the sci-fi disaster movie about impending meteorite-related disaster, attempts to destroy it, and possibly some cataclysmic havoc.

programme.title: Rescue Dawn
programme.desc: (2006) Werner Herzog's fact-based survival story stars Christian Bale as a US fighter pilot taken prisoner in Vietnam after being shot down during a top-secret mission.

programme.title: M3GAN
programme.desc: (2022) Creepy-doll horror with Allison Williams. A robotics engineer simultaneously invents an AI dolly and takes on the care of her orphaned niece. But can a cyborg really raise a kid?

programme.title: Corsage
programme.desc: (2022) Marie Kreutzer's tightly corseted biographical drama starring Vicky Krieps as a quietly defiant Empress Elisabeth of Austria as she turns 40 on Christmas Eve 1877. In German/subs.

programme.title: The Nevadan
programme.desc: (1950) Western with Randolph Scott and Dorothy Malone. A cunning US Marshal pretends to be a doofus to get a bank robber to take him to the hidden loot.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny
programme.desc: (1954) Oscar-nominated Humphrey Bogart, in one of his finest roles, stars in Edward Dmytryk's gripping drama as Captain Philip Queeg, in charge of a US Navy minesweeper during the war.

programme.title: Santa Fe
programme.desc: (1951) Western starring Randolph Scott. Four brothers leave the defeated South to seek jobs as the US recovers from the Civil War. As one becomes a railwayman, the others turn to crime.

programme.title: Apache Drums
programme.desc: (1951) Stephen McNally stars as a gunslinger who gets slung out of town for gambling too well, but the town might just need him soon in Hugo Fregonese's visually arresting western.

programme.title: The Land Girls
programme.desc: (1997) Moving Second World War drama starring Catherine McCormack, Rachel Weisz and Anna Friel as young women who volunteer to be agricultural workers and fall for the farmer's son.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: (2000) Fact-based legal drama. Julia Roberts won an Oscar, Golden Globe and BAFTA for her portrayal of a single mum making a huge impact at a legal firm despite having no formal training.

programme.title: Bombshell
programme.desc: (2019) Drama with Charlize Theron, Nicole Kidman and Margot Robbie. Three Fox News employees fight to expose the inappropriate behaviour of a media mogul (John Lithgow).

programme.title: Hear My Song
programme.desc: (1991) Unashamedly romantic comedy starring Ned Beatty as Josef Locke, a 1950s singer with a voice that makes women weep... in a good way. Co-starring Adrian Dunbar.
